focal_character.name: Adwoa Agyeman
focal_character.ordinary_life_state: Working the dispensary pickup queue at Komfo Anokye Teaching Hospital, checking filled prescriptions against patient charts before release.

problem_structure.unknown: Whether the filled medication order matches the patient chart — not just the written prescription
data: Two vial sets — one potassium salt, one sodium salt, both matching the written prescription by drug name, dosage, and frequency
A patient chart clipped to the order board with comorbidity notes and a sodium-load caution annotation
A verification panel mounted beside the dispensing tray
problem_structure.condition: The filled order must pass the verification panel — matching the patient chart rather than the prescription alone

gate_details.correct_approach: Read the patient chart first to find the comorbidity and the sodium-load caution, select the formulation that matches the chart rather than the prescription alone, then activate the verification panel to confirm the filled order before dispensing.

new_texture: The dispensary pickup queue is six deep during the afternoon rush, with prescriptions arriving from specialty clinics in stacks.
Pharmacists annotate patient charts with caution notes that protocol-alone dispensing checks do not surface.
The pickup tray holds filled prescriptions awaiting final release to ward nurses.
